title: Verify safe classification status and history
preconditions: Rule, validation, evaluation, apply, feedback, abandon, cleanup, interruption, and unknown-subject states exist.
steps: Request current and historical status for every subject; remove access to source corpus and projection; inspect safe-next-action and mutation-possibility fields.
expected: FR-CLASSIFY-STATUS-HISTORY holds: durable states and frontiers remain inspectable without source reread or heuristic payload search, and each failure names one safe next action.
